title: JobHistory Directory in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'jobhistory' directory stores job history files, managed by EventReader.java and EventWriter.java. EventReader deserializes Avro-encoded job events, while EventWriter serializes them into JSON or binary formats. JobFinishedEvent.java represents job completion, encapsulating job-specific data. JobHistoryParser.java parses history files, populating JobInfo with detailed job, task, and counter information. The directory uses Strategy pattern for event handling and Adapter pattern for data format conversion.
